title: Onyix Skins
description: A clean, lightweight skin changer for your server. Let players pick any skin with a command or use the built-in GUI to browse trending looks. No client-side mods needed.
body:
OnyixSkins is a straightforward identity manager for Paper/Spigot servers.

It does exactly what it says:

/skin [Username]: Instantly change your look to match anyone else’s skin.
/skins: Opens a clean menu where you can click on common/trending skins to apply them.
/skin reset: Goes back to your original Mojang account skin.

All processing is done off the main thread so it won't lag your server. It’s "plug-and-play" with a minimal config file.
